'''Hodo''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] who [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] [[Black Flight]] of the [[24th Bombardment Squadron]], attached to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]]. Hodo was in constant competition with [[Esege Tuketu]] for [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] command.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
